signals.headline: # XRP ETF Inflows Surge 254% Week-over-Week | YES | HIGH confidence
signals.raw: # XRP ETF Inflows Surge 254% Week-over-Week | YES | HIGH confidence

signals.headline: XRP spot ETFs recorded $41
signals.raw: XRP spot ETFs recorded $41.64 million in net inflows for the week ending April 16—a 254% jump from the prior week's $11.75 million**[2], marking the largest single-week inflow in three months. This acceleration represents the kind of conviction typically accompanying pattern breakouts rather than consolidation[2].

signals.headline: XRP has surged 12
signals.raw: XRP has surged 12.5% from its April lows**[2], with cumulative ETF inflows reaching $1.26 billion since the SEC lawsuit resolution[3]. The recent inflow pattern is significant because it arrived *before* a potential breakout—reversing March's pattern where flows lagged the breakout[2]. signals.headline: Market sentiment remains cautious despite the rally
signals.raw: Market sentiment remains cautious despite the rally.** Prediction market odds show only 0.2% probability of XRP reaching $1.80 by April 19[3], reflecting limited time before expiry. Broader crypto weakness tied to U.S.-Iran diplomatic tensions has also created headwinds[3], though de-escalation has shifted positioning toward risk-on sentiment[3].
